kept_row_snapshot.title: Office Visit - Professional Consultation
kept_row_snapshot.summary: Discussed pet's medical needs with owner. Pet needs four baby canines removed and is scheduled for neutering. Owner wants both procedures done simultaneously. Pet seen by specialist in Charleston for jaw issues. Pet not on medications or supplements and has missed heartworm preventative doses. Advised to start heartworm preventative and test. Fed Purina Puppy Kibble and microchipped. Considering NexGard Plus. Flu vaccine recommended due to potential exposure. Cost of flu vaccine is $53.50 per dose, requires two doses initially. Anti-inflammatory can be provided for discomfort. Year's worth of flea prevention discussed. Dental issues include additional baby teeth to remove. Pre-op blood work and heartworm test planned.

backup_note: Deleted rows below are byte-identical duplicates (same pet + date + clinic + identical title/type/vaccine_type) of the retained `kept_id` row. This run's captured columns are the identity/dedup-key columns plus household_id; the retained canonical row's FULL content is attached as `kept_row_snapshot` (it carries the clinical free-text). Every source document was also re-extracted to pending_review in Phase 3, re-surfacing the same content for founder review. The reprocess-phase2 script now selects('*') so future runs capture full rows.
